---
title: "Annotate_CpGs"
output: html_document
date: '2025-01-30'
---

```{r}
library(openxlsx)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
```

## Paths to Excel files
```{r}
Diseases_path <- 'C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/All_diseases_combined_MixedModel_Results.xlsx'
CHD2_path <- 'C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/CHD2_MixedModel_Results.xlsx'
NANS_path <- 'C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/NANS_MixedModel_Results.xlsx'
DM1_path <- 'C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/DM1_MixedModel_Results.xlsx'
DM1_rescue_path <- 'C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/DM1_rescue_MixedModel_Results.xlsx'
DM1_P2_P3_path <- 'C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/DM1_P2_P3_MixedModel_Results.xlsx'
Sex_path <- 'C:/Users/Z896216/Documents/Sex_MixedModel_Results.xlsx'
```

## Read Excel data
```{r}
Disease_methylation_data <- read.xlsx(Diseases_path, sheet = 'EMseq')
CHD2_methylation_data <- read.xlsx(CHD2_path, sheet = 'EMseq')
NANS_methylation_data <- read.xlsx(NANS_path, sheet = 'EMseq')
DM1_methylation_data <- read.xlsx(DM1_path, sheet = 'EMseq')
DM1_rescue_methylation_data <- read.xlsx(DM1_rescue_path, sheet = 'EMseq')
DM1_P2_P3_methylation_data <- read.xlsx(DM1_P2_P3_path, sheet = 'EMseq')
Sex_methylation_data <- read.xlsx(Sex_path, sheet = 'EMseq')
```


## Get CpG positions in GRanges object
```{r}
## Load annotations
txdb <- TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene
genes <- genes(txdb)

find_nearest_genes <- function(gene_locations) {
  
  split_positions <- strsplit(gene_locations, "_")

  cpg_sites <- do.call(rbind, lapply(split_positions, function(x) data.frame(chr=x[1], start = as.numeric(x[2]))))
  cpg_sites$chr <- paste0("chr", cpg_sites$chr)
  cpg_sites$end <- cpg_sites$start
  
  gr_cpg_sites <- makeGRangesFromDataFrame(cpg_sites, keep.extra.columns = TRUE)
  
  ## Find nearest genes to cpg sites
  nearest_genes <- nearest(gr_cpg_sites, genes)
  nearest_genes_info <- genes[nearest_genes]
  nearest_genes_df <- data.frame(nearest_genes_info)
  ## Add gene symbols based on ENTREZ id
  gene_symbols <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db, keys = as.character(nearest_genes_df$gene_id), column = "SYMBOL", keytype = "ENTREZID", multiVals = "first")
  nearest_genes_df$gene_symbol <- gene_symbols

  ## Combine data frames
  cpg_with_genes <- cbind(as.data.frame(gr_cpg_sites), nearest_genes_df)

  
  return(cpg_with_genes)

}
```

## Find nearest genes for the Disease vs Healthy results
```{r}
cpg_with_genes_Disease <- find_nearest_genes(Disease_methylation_data$feature)

## Add entrez ID and gene symbols to Mixed Model results
Disease_methylation_data$EntrezID <- cpg_with_genes_Disease$gene_id
Disease_methylation_data$Gene_symbol <- cpg_with_genes_Disease$gene_symbol
```


## Find nearest genes for the CHD2 vs Healthy results
```{r}
cpg_with_genes_CHD2 <- find_nearest_genes(CHD2_methylation_data$feature)

CHD2_methylation_data$EntrezID <- cpg_with_genes_CHD2$gene_id
CHD2_methylation_data$Gene_symbol <- cpg_with_genes_CHD2$gene_symbol

```


## Add the same gene symbols for DM1
```{r}
if (identical(CHD2_methylation_data$feature, DM1_methylation_data$feature)) {
  DM1_methylation_data$EntrezID <- cpg_with_genes_CHD2$gene_id
  DM1_methylation_data$Gene_symbol <- cpg_with_genes_CHD2$gene_symbol
}

cpg_with_genes_DM1_rescue <- find_nearest_genes(DM1_rescue_methylation_data$feature)
DM1_rescue_methylation_data$EntrezID <- cpg_with_genes_DM1_rescue$gene_id
DM1_rescue_methylation_data$Gene_symbol <- cpg_with_genes_DM1_rescue$gene_symbol

```


## Add the same gene symbols for NANS
```{r}
if (identical(CHD2_methylation_data$feature, NANS_methylation_data$feature)) {
  NANS_methylation_data$EntrezID <- cpg_with_genes_CHD2$gene_id
  NANS_methylation_data$Gene_symbol <- cpg_with_genes_CHD2$gene_symbol
}
```


## Add the same gene symbols for Sex-associations
```{r}
cpg_with_genes_sex <- find_nearest_genes(Sex_methylation_data$feature)
Sex_methylation_data$EntrezID <- cpg_with_genes_sex$gene_id
Sex_methylation_data$Gene_symbol <- cpg_with_genes_sex$gene_symbol
```


# Save results to same Excel file
```{r}
wb <- loadWorkbook(file = Diseases_path)
writeData(wb, sheet = 'EMseq', x = Disease_methylation_data, withFilter = F)
saveWorkbook(wb, Diseases_path, overwrite = T)
```


```{r}
wb <- loadWorkbook(CHD2_path)
writeData(wb, sheet = 'EMseq', x = CHD2_methylation_data, withFilter = F)
saveWorkbook(wb, CHD2_path, overwrite = T)
```


```{r}
wb <- loadWorkbook(NANS_path)
writeData(wb, sheet = 'EMseq', x = NANS_methylation_data, withFilter = F)
saveWorkbook(wb, NANS_path, overwrite = T)
```


```{r}
wb <- loadWorkbook(DM1_path)
writeData(wb, sheet = 'EMseq', x = DM1_methylation_data, withFilter = F)
saveWorkbook(wb, DM1_path, overwrite = T)

wb <- loadWorkbook(DM1_rescue_path)
writeData(wb, sheet = 'EMseq', x = DM1_rescue_methylation_data, withFilter = F)
saveWorkbook(wb, DM1_rescue_path, overwrite = T)
```  


```{r}
wb <- loadWorkbook(Sex_path)
writeData(wb, sheet = 'EMseq', x = Sex_methylation_data, withFilter = F)
saveWorkbook(wb, Sex_path, overwrite = T)
```
